positive: A minimalist illustration of a celestial cityscape, depicting stylized flying lanterns, abstract constellations forming geometric patterns, and serene crescent moons floating above a gentle, curved horizon line. The style is modern, clean line art mixed with vibrant watercolor washes, featuring deep indigo blues, soft gold metallics, and pops of turquoise. The composition should be perfectly centered, ideal for repeating textile patterns, emphasizing strong, elegant silhouettes and high contrast between the dark night sky and the glowing lights. Focus on symmetry and ethereal, dreamy quality. Vector art aesthetic, suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, noise, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cartoonish, photorealistic, grunge, dirty, messy
